title: Incyte: A Biotech Stock With Improving Growth Prospects And A Favorable Chart
text: Biotech has pulled back sharply after a summer rebound, but the niche continues to outperform the S&P 500. One mid-sized biotech company is looking forward to better earnings ahead with a decent pipeline of oncology and dermatology products.

title: Incyte (INCY) Down 2.9% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Incyte (INCY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
